message:
test(oracle): add 18 conformance tests (s225-s242), 2 ignored for known gaps

Multi-column PK, FK constraints, empty string vs NULL, nested functions,
aggregate with NULLs, multi-column UPDATE, HAVING without GROUP BY, CAST
edges, PRINTF formats, complex CTE with joins, implicit type conversion,
subquery-in-FROM aliases, ORDER BY null handling, INSERT OR IGNORE
(ignored: UNIQUE non-PK), expression indexes (ignored: not implemented),
DELETE all rows, multi-schema queries, window SUM OVER PARTITION.
564 pass, 5 pre-existing type-coercion fails, 4 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
